patch.value: Dependency alignment task for the 2026-06-06 ecosystem sweep. The package is itself pm-changelog, so the scope is @unbrained/pm-cli tooling currency plus release checks, not adding a self-dependency.
Align package dependencies to pm CLI/SDK 2026.6.6
Refresh pm-changelog development dependency metadata after the 2026.6.6 pm CLI release and verify release readiness.
package.json and lockfile use the current published pm CLI/SDK 2026.6.6; local check/test/audit/pack/changelog checks pass; no secrets or private data are introduced.

value.author: codex
value.text: Created during companion item pm-cli-website-qudd after npm latest @unbrained/pm-cli and pm-changelog were confirmed as 2026.6.6.

patch.value: Package manifest and lockfile now use pm CLI/SDK tooling 2026.6.6; changelog integration regenerated where applicable; repository-specific hygiene fixes applied without telemetry changes.
release:check, npm test, production audit, pm package doctor, and real-data package smoke checks pass.

Passed npm run release:check and npm test for all 15 packages; npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities; combined real-data smoke workspace installed all 15 packages and exercised import/export, graph, gantt, slack, standup, presets, starters, changelog, and pm-web doctor successfully.
Aligned package tooling with pm CLI/SDK 2026.6.6 and verified release readiness.
